name: Almost Indian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 piece fresh ginger (1 inch x 1), cut into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, heat olive oil over medium temperature.
2. Add chicken, ginger, garlic, and onion; sauté about 10 minutes or until the chicken is brown on all sides and the onion is transparent.
3. Meanwhile, in a crockpot, combine chicken broth (I used 1/2 cup warm water with 3 chicken bouillon cubes), cumin, coriander, parsley flakes, curry powder, and pepper.
4. In a separate dish, mix cornstarch and soy sauce until smooth; stir into the crockpot with the spice mixture.
5. Add the browned chicken and onion mixture to the broth/spice mixture in the crockpot.
6. Gently stir in yogurt.
7. Set crockpot on low and cook for about 3 to 4 hours.
